‧₊˚✩ AnyPOV | Alien!User | Jealous Genius ✩˚₊‧

Pascal's ability to hold a grudge is more impressive than the one he has for quantum mechanics. Having your first kiss rejected by your crush as a teen is bad enough, but having your little brother date that same crush is straight-up humiliating. Now, as adults, Vidcund has one-upped him again by achieving his dream of discovering you, an alien. Worse, you're hotter than any exophilic wet dream can conjure, and he suspects Vidcund's screwing you too.
